steps.title: Use the table values
steps.content: Use two points from the table. From $(1,5)$ to $(2,7)$, the slope is $$m=\frac{7-5}{2-1}=2.$$ Substitute $(1,5)$ into $y=mx+b$: $$5=2(1)+b,$$ so $b=3$.

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content: The model values give $$y=2x+3.$$ You can also see this by hand: every time $x$ increases by $1$, $y$ increases by $2$, so the slope is $2$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice A is correct. A quick point check confirms it: when $x=1$, $2(1)+3=5$, and when $x=4$, $2(4)+3=11$.
